The '''tentacle bird of Pelemax''' was an unusual flightless [[Bird/Legends|avian]] with tentacles that originated in the [[Pelemax system/Legends|Pelemax system]].

==Biology and appearance==
The birds had tentacles on its upper torso instead of wings. They were capable of going a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] without consuming water due to large internal storage receptacles located along the neck and upper torso. They emitted a particularly intimidating cry.<ref name="CG" />

==History==
They were used by the [[Pelemaxian]]s as a mount in time of war. They were later sold by the Pelemaxians off-world to be used as beasts of burden on desert of jungle worlds. It was theorized that the creatures could either be a mutation or a hybrid between two creatures.<ref name="CG" />
